role.zh: 数据科学与大数据技术专业本科生

intro.en: Passionate about AI, Large Language Models, and Full-Stack Development. Experienced in building intelligent systems, data mining, and machine learning models.
intro.zh: 对人工智能、大语言模型和全栈开发充满热情。在构建智能系统、数据挖掘和机器学习模型方面拥有丰富经验。

institution.en: Northern China University of Technology & Brunel University London
institution.zh: 北方工业大学 & 布鲁内尔大学 (中外合办)

degree.en: B.S. in Data Science and Big Data Technology
degree.zh: 数据科学与大数据技术专业 本科在读

courses.en: Advanced Math (97), Linear Algebra (95), Probability & Statistics (95), Database (95), Data Structures (92), Machine Learning (97).
courses.zh: 高等数学 (97)、线性代数 (95)、概率统计 (95)、数据库 (95)、数据结构 (92)、机器学习 (97)。

en: 2024-2025: Outstanding Student Scholarship, Innovation Scholarship, Academic Excellence Scholarship, Moral Character Scholarship, and Physical & Aesthetic Education Scholarship.
2023-2024: Academic Excellence Scholarship, Innovation Scholarship, and Moral Character Scholarship.
zh: 荣获2024-2025学年：优秀学生奖学金，以及创新、学习奖学金、思想品德和体美奖学金。
荣获2023-2024学年：学习、创新、思想品德奖学金。

en: National Undergraduate Basic Engineering Training Comprehensive Ability Competition (School Level) — First Prize (2024/10)

National Undergraduate Market Research and Analysis Competition, Beijing Division — Third Prize (2025/04)
NCUT Market Research and Analysis Competition — Second Runner-up (2025/03)
Beijing Municipal Undergraduate Mathematics Competition — Third Prize, Individual (2024/11)
DatangCup National Undergraduate Mobile Communications Competition — Participation Award (2024/04)
Siemens Cup School Competition — Second Prize (2024/04)
NCUT London Brunel Institute Career Planning Competition — Third Prize (2023/12)
zh: 大学生基础工程训练综合能力竞赛校内选拔赛 — 最高等级（团体）(2024/10)
中国大学生工程实践与创新能力大赛北京市选拔赛 — 最高等级（团体）(2025/03)
北方工业大学工程制图与三维建模大赛 — 第三等级（个人）(2024/10)
MathorCup数学应用挑战赛（华北赛区）— 第三等级（团体）(2025/04)
美国大学生数学建模竞赛（MCM/ICM）— S奖（团体）(2025/01)
全国大学生市场调查与分析大赛北京分赛区选拔赛 — 第三等级（团体）(2025/04)
北方工业大学市场调查与分析大赛 — 次高等级（团体）(2025/03)
北京市大学生数学竞赛 — 第三等级（个人）(2024/11)
大唐杯全国大学生移动通信大赛 — 参与奖（团体）(2024/04)
西门子杯校赛 — 二等奖（团体）(2024/04)
北方工业大学伦敦布鲁内尔学院职业规划大赛 — 三等奖（团体）(2023/12)

company.en: Beijing Ascend Artificial Intelligence Technology Co., Ltd.
company.zh: 北京昇腾人工智能科技有限公司

en: LLM Architecture: Studied Transformer and mechanisms, focusing on RAG flow, embeddings, and prompt engineering.
RAG System Design: Designed end-to-end RAG intelligent government service system, building knowledge base and retrieval pipeline.
Vector Retrieval: Built high-availability retrieval module using FAISS.
Model Integration: Used Spring Boot and FastAPI to integrate DeepSeek and Qwen-1.5B distilled models.
AI Full-Stack Dev: Collaborated on Java frontend and backend to deliver a deployable prototype system.
zh: 大模型基础学习：系统学习基于 Transformer 的大语言模型架构与工作机制，重点掌握 RAG 流程设计、嵌入模型选型等。
RAG 系统设计与实现：独立参与端到端 RAG 智能政务服务系统设计与落地，完成知识库构建、检索增强与答案生成链路编排。
检索链路搭建：基于向量数据库 FAISS 构建高可用检索模块。
模型集成与后端开发：使用 Spring Boot 与 FastAPI 集成蒸馏大语言模型 (DeepSeek, 蒸馏自 Qwen-1.5B)，完成统一 API 封装。
AI 全栈应用开发：参与前端 (Java) 与后端协同开发，完成可本地部署运行的原型系统。

company.en: Beijing TRS Information Technology Co., Ltd.
company.zh: 北京拓尔思信息技术股份有限公司

en: Data Mining Pipeline: Practiced full pipeline including data collection, cleaning, feature engineering, and model training.
Machine Learning Modeling: Applied linear regression, decision tree, random forest, SVM, NN, XGBoost on real business data.
Data Analysis & Visualization: Completed exploratory analysis using Python (NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Scikit-learn).
Project Practice: Completed housing price prediction and credit card fraud detection projects.
Business Reporting: Interpreted model results combined with business scenarios, outputting structured analysis reports.
zh: 数据挖掘流程实践：系统学习并实践数据采集、清洗预处理、特征构建、模型训练、效果评估与迭代优化等完整数据挖掘流程。
机器学习建模：在真实业务数据集上应用线性回归、决策树、随机森林、支持向量机、神经网络、XGBoost 等算法开展预测分析与模型对比。
数据分析与可视化：使用 Python 及相关工具 (NumPy、Pandas、Matplotlib、Scikit-learn、Jupyter Notebook) 完成探索性分析与结果可视化。
项目实战与评估：完成住宿价格预测、信用卡交易欺诈检测等项目。
业务理解与报告输出：结合业务场景解释模型结果，输出结构化分析报告与可视化结论。

name.en: SenviX: AI Edge-Cloud Synergetic Multi-Modal Smart Mobility System
name.zh: 基于 AI 边云协同与多模态感知的 “SenviX” 泛场景智能助行系统

en: Team Coordination: Established agile dev cycle, coordinated hardware chassis design and upper-level software algorithms.
Multi-Modal Integration: Based on ROS and SLAM tech, achieved indoor mapping and navigation. Deployed YOLO for object detection and Ollama local LLM for offline voice control.
Achievements: Won First Prize in 2025 'Challenge Cup' Beijing Extracurricular Academic Competition, evaluated as a Municipal Level Project.
zh: 团队统筹与敏捷管理：定期组织研发会议，建立敏捷开发周期与问题追踪机制；统筹协调底层硬件结构设计与上层软件算法接口对接。
多模态系统集成与算法落地：基于 ROS 系统与 SLAM 技术实现室内高精度环境建图与自主导航；部署 YOLO 目标检测模型，完成 Ollama 本地大语言模型部署，实现语音控制。
科研成果与荣誉认可：成功交付具备感知、决策、反馈闭环的产品原型，带队斩获 2025 年 “挑战杯” 首都大学生课外学术科技作品竞赛三等奖，并评定为北京市级大创项目。

name.en: Multidimensional Psychological Abilities in New-Generation LLMs
name.zh: 新一代大模型多维心理学能力研究

role.en: First Author (Advised by Prof. Philipp Koehn & Prof. Bo Wang)

en: Experimental Design: Evaluated ChatGPT-5 and Gemini 2.5 on Theory of Mind (ToM) and cognitive biases based on the Kosinski task.
Quantitative Analysis: Used Python (Pandas, NumPy, SciPy) to parse massive JSON experimental data, introducing Pearson correlation and Bland-Altman statistics.
Achievements: English paper officially accepted by EIEPD 2026 (EI Compendex & Scopus indexed).
zh: 实验设计：聚焦大模型与心理学交叉领域，基于经典心理学范式复现 Kosinski 错误信念任务框架，系统性评估 ChatGPT-5、Gemini 2.5 等新一代大模型在心理理论等多维度的类人认知表现。
量化分析：独立解析大规模 JSON 实验输出数据，利用 Python (Pandas、NumPy、SciPy) 进行核心数据处理与可视化绘制；引入 Pearson 相关系数、Bland-Altman 等严谨的统计学方法。
科研成果：以第一作者身份撰写并发表英文学术论文，该论文已被第五届电子信息工程与数据处理国际会议 (EIEPD 2026) 正式录用，支持 EI Compendex 与 Scopus 双检索。

name.en: Smart Sorting Trash Can Based on YOLO
name.zh: 基于 YOLO 的智能分类垃圾桶

en: Program Dev: Led the programming of electromechanical control and auto-sorting based on YOLOv8 vision recognition.
Hardware Collaboration: Worked closely with mechanical team to ensure perfect combination of appearance and function.
Achievements: Won Special Prize in Beijing Undergraduate Engineering Practice and Innovation Competition, and National Second Prize.
zh: 程序开发：主导编写机械电控与分拣程序，实现舵机精准控制与垃圾桶自动分类，并完善满载检测功能与视觉识别系统，确保 YOLOv8 模型识别准确率和稳定性。
硬件协作：与机械团队密切合作，共同设计垃圾桶外观，确保外观与功能的完美结合，并建立独立分拣机构。
项目成果：项目荣获北京市大学生工程实践与创新能力大赛特等奖，并被推荐进入中国大学生工程实践与创新能力大赛并获得全国二等奖。

name.en: Smart Eye-Controlled Wheelchair Based on Arduino
name.zh: 基于 Arduino 的智能眼控轮椅项目

en: Recognition Optimization: Used Matlab Viola-Jones algorithm for face and eye detection, applying Hough transform for pupil localization.
Signal Generation: Designed control system to convert eye movement positions to motion control commands transmitted via Bluetooth to Arduino.
Project Outcome: High evaluation and recommendation letter from the project supervisor.
zh: 识别优化：基于 Matlab 的 Viola-Jones 算法进行人脸及眼部检测，对图像进行裁剪与灰度化处理，提升帧率和实时性，并通过 Hough 变换进行圆形检测，准确识别瞳孔位置和方向。
信号生成：独立设计控制系统，在 Matlab 中实现依据眼球位置生成轮椅运动控制指令的功能，通过蓝牙通信将运动指令实时传送至 Arduino，实现姿态控制指令自定义化和动作标准化。
项目成果：设计并实现智能眼控轮椅，通过眼球运动来控制轮椅的行驶方向，系统响应灵敏、运行稳定；项目获得导师高度评价和推荐信。

en: Drew part drawings and engineering drawings for the equatorial mount model.
zh: 绘制赤道仪模型的零件图，工程图

name.en: Ski Industry Demographic Profile and Consumption Habits
name.zh: 滑雪产业人群画像及消费习惯

en: Created questionnaires to survey peoples skiing habits and consumption trends.
Used web scraping technology to extract comments about skiing from mainstream social media and generated word clouds.
zh: 制作问卷调查人群滑雪的习惯和消费趋势
通过爬虫技术爬取主流社交媒体对于滑雪的评论，绘制词云

name.zh: 基于时间序列，线性回归和层次分析的奥运奖牌预测模型的构建

en: US Mathematical Contest in Modeling (MCM/ICM) problem.
Used Python programming to build an Olympic medal prediction model based on time series, linear regression, and analytic hierarchy process (AHP).
Plotted images and wrote the final research paper.
zh: 美国数学建模竞赛题目
通过python编��构建基于时间序列，线性回归和层次分析的奥运奖牌预测模型
和图像的绘制，以及后期论文的撰写

name.zh: 基于鸿蒙的个人博客软件开发

location.zh: 鸿蒙应用软件开发实验室

en: Used DevEco Studio for HarmonyOS software programming.
Created front-end interfaces and functions based on Java.
Established a back-end database using SQLite.
Conducted software simulation using a local emulator.
zh: 使用DevEco studio进行鸿蒙软件的编程开发
基于Java语言创建前端界面和函数
使用sqlite数据库建立后端数据库
使用本地模拟器对软件进行模拟仿真

name.zh: 基于鸿蒙的外卖软件开发

location.zh: 鸿蒙应用软件开发实验室

en: Used DevEco Studio for HarmonyOS software programming.
Created front-end interfaces and functions based on Java.
Established a back-end database using MySQL.
Conducted software simulation using a local emulator.
zh: 使用DevEco studio进行鸿蒙软件的编程开发
基于Java语言创建前端界面和函数
使用Mysql数据库建立后端数据库
使用本地模拟器对软件进行模拟仿真

en: Drew 3D models of the badminton robot, conceptualized the mechanisms of various parts, and outlined the selection of hardware and algorithms.
Participated independently during freshman year, but due to limited knowledge and the massive scope of the project, it remained at the software conceptualization stage without a physical output.
zh: 绘制羽毛球机器人的3D模型，构思羽毛球各部位机构，以及硬件的选择和算法的选择思路
大一下独立参赛，但由于知识量过少，以及项目体系过大难以实现
只停留在软件构思层面，没有实物产出

en: Built a smart car based on Arduino.
Implemented line-tracking, obstacle avoidance, and remote control functions.

zh: 英文 (流利, 托福 iBT 5)

name.en: International Summer School in Engineering and Robotics
name.zh: 工程与机器人国际夏校

location.zh: 英国伦敦布鲁内尔大学

en: Hardcore Engineering Practice: Participated in Arduino-based Robotics Challenge and 'Eye Controlled Wheelchair' core team project, ultimately completing project roadshow and demonstration.

Frontier Academic Exploration: Attended scientific lectures by professors from Electrical & Electronic Engineering, Mechanical & Aerospace, and Civil & Environmental Engineering departments, covering cutting-edge fields like 'Future Power Systems', 'Micro-Robotics', and 'Additive Manufacturing in Biomedical Engineering'.

Academic Skills Enhancement: Received systematic training from the ASK (Academic Skills) team, including critical thinking, paper structure, academic report writing, anti-plagiarism, and presentation skills.
Industry & Cultural Visit: Visited UK robotics enterprises; toured Oxford University, Cambridge University, Bath, Windsor Castle, and the London Science Museum for deep cultural immersion.
zh: 硬核工程实践：参与了基于 Arduino 的机器人挑战 (Robotics Challenge) 以及“眼控轮椅 (Eye Controlled Wheelchair)”的小组核心项目研发 ，并最终完成了项目路演与演示 。
前沿学术探索：参加了由大学电气与电子工程、机械与航空航天、土木与环境工程等学系教授主讲的科研讲座，涵盖“未来电力系统”、“微型机器人”和“生物医学工程中的增材制造”等前沿领域 。
学术技能提升：接受了 ASK (Academic Skills) 团队的系统培训，包括批判性思维、论文结构、学术报告撰写、防抄袭以及演讲技巧 。
行业与文化探访：实地参访了英国机器人相关企业 ；游历了牛津大学、剑桥大学、巴斯、温莎城堡及伦敦科学博物馆，进行了深度的文化沉浸 。

name.zh: 青年使者赴美交流项目

location.en: United States (California / East Coast & Local Communities)
location.zh: 美国（涵盖加州/美东及当地社区）

en: Cross-cultural Immersion: Stayed with local American families throughout the program, deeply participated in their weekend life, and explored differences in family structures and cultures between China and the US.

Sino-US Education & Social Research: Visited top US universities including UCLA, Princeton, and UPenn (Wharton) to understand differences in higher education systems; visited local fire departments, police stations, and NGOs (e.g., Food Bank) to study public service, volunteerism, and public safety mechanisms.

Chinese Culture Output: Acted as a cultural ambassador, demonstrating traditional Chinese culture like Hanfu, paper cutting, and calligraphy to foreign friends and host families, and invited American families to visit China, promoting people-to-people cross-cultural exchange.
zh: 跨文化沉浸：全程入住当地美国家庭，深度参与美式家庭周末生活，探讨中美家庭结构与文化差异 。
中美教育与社会调研：参访了包括UCLA、普林斯顿大学、宾夕法尼亚大学（沃顿商学院）等美国顶尖高校，了解中美高等教育体系差异 ；深入当地消防局、警察局及非营利组织（如“食物银行”），研讨美国的公共服务、志愿服务及公共安全机制 。
中国文化输出：作为文化传播使者，向外国友人及寄宿家庭展示汉服、手工剪纸、毛笔字等中国传统特色文化，并邀请美国家庭来华，促进民间跨文化交流 。

en: Guarded garbage bins, promoted and guided garbage classification.
zh: 垃圾桶前站岗，垃圾分类宣传与引导

en: Painted promotional canvas bags related to Earth Day.
zh: 绘制世界地球日相关的宣传帆布包

en: Maintained on-site order and served participants.
zh: 维持现场秩序，服务参赛选手
